Event: The Twilight Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 06/06/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: S30
Twilight Hero Sword

When attacking, has a [21%-23%] chance of restoring [10%-12%] health in self.
When an enemy unit is resurrected, the sword wielder throws the sword at them, dealing 172000 pure damage to the target and all enemy units in a small radius around them. They can't recover health for 3 sec. The resurrected unit is also stunned for 3 sec. The ability can be triggered only once in 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
